stemHtml: Aircraft flight characteristics including performance, stability, and control may be affected by icing. Compared to the effects of icing in flight, the effects encountered on the ground...

options.a: are dependent on whether the aircraft is certified for operations in icing conditions.
options.b: are the same, as the characteristics resulting from frost, snow or ice accumulation are the same.
options.c: may be totally different, due to the accumulation of frost, snow or ice on unprotected aircraft areas.
options.d: are dependent on the use of the ice and rain protection systems whilst on the ground.
